column3: description

column1: # Tiers: L2 level-up (x2), L3 subclass (x4 per oath), L5 power (x3), L9 subclass power (x2 per oath)

column3: Spend a breath on the vein-mark carved into your palm; the next discipline card you play this turn costs 1 less AP (minimum 0).
Draw a slow, measured breath through clenched teeth; gain temporary HP equal to your RESONANCE and your next melee hit this turn adds your RESONANCE modifier to the damage.
Plant your blade in the earth and name your ward. Make a melee attack; on hit, you and your ward gain a bonus to AC until the start of your next turn.
Speak a clipped, formal order in the voice of the House. One ally within sight may immediately use their reaction to move up to their speed or make one weapon attack.
Claim a 10-foot square around you as the Lord's ground; enemies that enter or start their turn there have disadvantage on attacks not targeting you until the start of your next turn.
Press your oath-seal against an ally's armor. Until the start of your next turn, any damage that ally takes from an attack is reduced by your IRON modifier, and you take half of the reduced amount.
Draw your blade through the space between thoughts. Make a melee attack; on hit, the target loses one beneficial condition or concentration effect of your choice.
Your next attack this turn cuts something deeper than flesh; on hit, the target cannot use any card or reaction it used on its previous turn until the end of its next turn.
Step sideways through the void between moments. Teleport up to 20 feet to a space you can see; the first attack you make before the end of your turn is made with advantage.

Draw the void-edge along your oath-mark and speak a single syllable no one hears. One creature within 30 feet is Silenced and cannot use spoken or resonance-channeled abilities until the start of your next turn.
Carve a tally into the haft of your blade with your thumb. Mark one enemy as a debt; while marked, your attacks against it deal bonus RESONANCE damage and you know its direction while it lives.
Make a melee attack against a debt-marked creature; on hit, deal bonus damage equal to the number of debts you currently hold, and transfer one of your debts to this creature if it was unmarked.

Take the burden of an unfinished obligation onto your shoulders. Until the start of your next turn, you cannot be knocked prone, moved, or reduced below 1 HP by any source except a debt-marked creature.

Reaction: when a debt-marked creature within 30 feet is reduced to 0 HP by anyone, regain HP equal to your IRON modifier plus your level and remove the debt; you may immediately mark another enemy you can see.

Run a thumb along the prayer-scars down your forearm; until the start of your next turn, damage dealt to you is reduced by your RESONANCE modifier and your melee attacks deal that same amount as bonus damage.
Spend HP equal to twice your level as a deliberate cut; your next melee attack this turn automatically hits and cannot be reduced by resistance, only by immunity.

Set your feet and become the pillar of the temple. Until you move, enemies within 5 feet have disadvantage on attack rolls against allies, and the first attack each turn against you triggers a free melee attack in return.

Press your palm to a fresh wound and bless it. End one disease, poison, or curse on yourself, and the next source of the same type that strikes you before your next long rest is automatically nullified.

For one minute, your bonded blade hums with your Vein Oath. You add your RESONANCE modifier to all melee attack and damage rolls, and once per round a hit forces a WIS save or target is stunned until the start of your next turn.

Drop into kneeling guard; a 15-foot aura of stillness surrounds you for one minute. Allies within gain your IRON modifier to AC and saves, and you cannot move but gain +10 to attack and damage when struck in melee.
Exhale once and make up to three melee attacks as a single motion against any combination of targets within reach. If all three hit, make a fourth attack that cannot miss.

Speak the Lord's binding word. For one minute, allies within 30 feet are immune to frightened and charmed, cannot be reduced below 1 HP while you stand, and gain your IRON modifier as bonus damage on the first hit each turn.
Anchor the battlefield as the seat of the House. You and your ward gain 3 levels' worth of temporary HP; any enemy within 20 feet that attacks someone other than you provokes a free attack from you.

Draw a single line through a target's fate. On hit, the creature must succeed on a CHA save or forget it knew you for one minute and cannot target you with attacks or abilities. On a critical hit, the effect persists until it rests.

Step fully into the between for six seconds. You are invisible and incorporeal; the first melee attack you make upon returning is an automatic critical that severs one class feature of the target until it completes a long rest.

Close the books. One debt-marked creature within 60 feet must succeed on a CON save or take damage equal to half its missing HP; if this reduces it to 0, the debt is settled and you recover all expended short-rest resources.

Name every debt you still carry. For one minute, you ignore damage from any non-debt creature, deal double your RESONANCE modifier as bonus damage per hit to debt-marked creatures, and gain one reaction per debt you hold.

Your scars bloom into living sutras. For one minute, healing done to you overflows to allies within 10 feet, melee damage you take is halved, and each attack you make inflicts one stack of Bleed matching your RESONANCE.

Ignite the living temple. You drop to half HP immediately; for the next minute, each melee attack against you is reflected as resonant damage equal to your level, and your own attacks ignore resistance and deal maximum damage on hit.
